body:
This PR adds the option to run a very long run of snowy land (10 years in length). This is accomplished by using the environment variable in both Buildkite and Julia.

A long run of 10 years is detected by the environment variable `LONG_RUN` in the Buildkite steps when uploading the pipeline. By default, `LONG_RUN="false"`. This environment variable can be replaced when making a new build or scheduled build in the "Environmental Variables" option. In `pipeline.yml`, we use a conditional based on the value of `LONG_RUN` to determine what group step to run. For the very long run, we also pass `LONG_RUN` as an environment variable which Julia can use to figure out which code to run for `snowy_land.jl`.

Todo
- [x] Make a schedule for running long run of 10 years on Buildkite.
title: Add very long run of snowy land
